content.text: Oh, no! You have accidentally removed all spaces, punctuation, and capitalization in a lengthy document. A sentence like "I reset the computer. It still didn't boot!" has become "iresetthecomputeritstilldidntboot'". You'll deal with the punctuation and capi-talization later; right now you need to re-insert the spaces. Most of the words are in a dictionary but a few are not. Given a dictionary (a list of strings) and the document (a string), design an algorithm to unconcatenate the document in a way that minimizes the number of unrecognized characters. Return the minimum number of unrecognized characters.
See problem output in legacy docs.
